title: Luxury French Dessert Brand Poster AI
sourceTitle: Luxury French Dessert Brand Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Luxury French dessert brand poster featuring strawberry cream cake with soft whipped cream and fresh berries, with elegant headline 甜，不只是味道。 and subtitle PARIS DESSERT HOUSE. Subject: strawberry cream cake with soft whipped cream and fresh berries is the central dessert hero, placed on a marble tabletop with sugar powder, delicate cream texture, fresh ingredient detail, and a refined afternoon-tea atmosphere. Scene: French cafe-inspired premium dessert advertising scene with clean lower text area, generous white space, soft natural light, marble surface, and boutique dessert editorial polish. Composition: Fixed 4:5 commercial poster layout: centered dessert hero in the upper and middle area, marble tabletop foundation, floating sugar-powder detail, clean lower typography zone, and enough negative space for a high-end brand feeling. Signature Elements: strawberry cream cake with soft whipped cream and fresh berries, marble tabletop, sugar powder, French afternoon-tea mood, lower clean text area, 甜，不只是味道。, PARIS DESSERT HOUSE, cream white and strawberry-pink luxury palette, and boutique dessert-brand finish. Style: Luxury dessert advertising, French cafe aesthetic, premium food editorial photography, commercial food poster finish, elegant magazine layout, and ultra-high-resolution appetizing detail. Color Palette: Cream white, strawberry pink, champagne gold, soft warm haze, pale marble gray, and restrained dessert-color accents. Lighting: Soft natural cafe window light with gentle highlights on cream, fruit, pastry edges, marble, and airborne sugar powder. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: 甜，不只是味道。 appears as the main elegant Serif poster line; PARIS DESSERT HOUSE appears as the smaller premium dessert-house subtitle, both readable and clean. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
